definition:
def get(informed_entities, route_id) do
  case informed_entities
       |> Subway.affected_stops_on_route(route_id)
       |> Enum.reject(&is_nil(&1)) do
    [] ->
      nil

    stop_lists ->
      {{min_full_name, min_abbreviated_name}, {max_full_name, max_abbreviated_name}} =
        to_endpoints(
          stop_lists,
          direction_names_for_route(route_id, affected_direction_id(informed_entities))
        )

      if min_full_name == max_full_name and min_abbreviated_name == max_abbreviated_name do
        %{full: "#{min_full_name}", abbrev: "#{min_abbreviated_name}"}
      else
        %{
          full: "#{min_full_name} ↔ #{max_full_name}",
          abbrev: "#{min_abbreviated_name} ↔ #{max_abbreviated_name}"
        }
      end
  end
end
elixir_type: (empty_list() or non_empty_list(%{:activities => non_empty_list(dynamic(), empty_list()), :direction_id => :nil or dynamic(), :facility => :nil or dynamic(), :route => :nil or dynamic(), :route_type => :nil or integer(), :stop => :nil or dynamic(), :__struct__ => :"Screens.Alerts.InformedEntity"}, empty_list()), binary() -> %{:full => binary(), :abbrev => binary()} or :nil)

definition:
def to_endpoints(stop_lists, direction_names) do
  stop_tree =
    stop_lists
    |> Enum.map(fn stops -> stops |> Enum.map(&{elem(&1, 0), elem(&1, 1)}) end)
    |> UnrootedPolytree.from_lists()

  %{first_stops: stop_tree |> first_stops(), last_stops: stop_tree |> last_stops()}
  |> case do
    %{first_stops: [first_stop], last_stops: [last_stop]} ->
      {first_stop, last_stop}

    %{first_stops: [first_stop], last_stops: _last_stops} ->
      {first_stop, tuple_for_direction_name(direction_names.forward)}

    %{first_stops: _first_stops, last_stops: [last_stop]} ->
      {tuple_for_direction_name(direction_names.backward), last_stop}

    %{first_stops: _first_stops, last_stops: _last_stops} ->
      {tuple_for_direction_name(direction_names.backward),
       tuple_for_direction_name(direction_names.forward)}
  end
end
elixir_type: (empty_list() or non_empty_list(empty_list() or non_empty_list({dynamic(), {binary(), binary()}}, empty_list()), empty_list()), %{:backward => binary(), :forward => binary()} -> {{binary(), binary()}, {binary(), binary()}})
(binary() -> {binary(), binary()})

def make_and_parse_request(url, options, decode_fn, vendor_name) do
  with {:response, {:ok, %Req.Response{status: 200, body: body}}} <-
         {:response, Req.get(url, Keyword.put(options, :decode_body, false))},
       {:decode, {:ok, decoded}} <- {:decode, decode_fn.(body)} do
    {:ok, decoded}
  else
    {:response, {:ok, %Req.Response{status: status}}} ->
      log_fetch_error(vendor_name, :status_not_ok, url, status: status)

    {:response, {:error, e}} ->
      log_fetch_error(vendor_name, :fetch_error, url, exception: inspect(e))

    {:decode, _} ->
      log_fetch_error(vendor_name, :decode_error, url)

    _ ->
      log_fetch_error(vendor_name, :error, url)
  end
end
elixir_type: (binary(), empty_list() or non_empty_list({atom(), term()}, empty_list()), (binary() -> {:ok, dynamic()} or {:error, term()}), atom() -> {:ok, dynamic()} or :error)
spec: @spec make_and_parse_request(url :: binary(), options :: keyword(), decode_fn :: (binary() -> {:ok, decoded} | {:error, term()}), vendor_name :: atom()) :: {:ok, decoded} | :error when [decoded: any()]

definition:
def period(datetime) do
  local_dt = Util.to_eastern(datetime)
  day_of_week = local_dt |> Util.service_date() |> Date.day_of_week()
  time = {local_dt.hour, local_dt.minute}
  am_peak? = time >= {7, 0} and time < {9, 0}
  pm_peak? = time >= {16, 0} and time <= {18, 30}
  peak_time? = am_peak? or pm_peak?

  case {day_of_week, peak_time?} do
    {6, _} -> :saturday
    {7, _} -> :sunday
    {_, true} -> :peak
    {_, false} -> :off_peak
  end
end
elixir_type: (%{:year => integer(), :month => integer(), :day => integer(), :calendar => atom(), :hour => integer(), :minute => integer(), :second => integer(), :microsecond => {integer(), integer()}, :time_zone => dynamic(), :zone_abbr => dynamic(), :utc_offset => integer(), :std_offset => integer(), :__struct__ => :"DateTime"} -> :peak or :off_peak or :saturday or :sunday)

definition:
def instances(
      %Screen{
        app_params: %Dup{
          primary_departures: primary_departures,
          secondary_departures: secondary_departures
        }
      } = config,
      now
    ) do
  primary_rds_sections = @rds.get(primary_departures, now)
  secondary_rds_sections = @rds.get(secondary_departures, now)
  primary_departure_sections = create_departure_sections(primary_rds_sections, primary_departures)

  secondary_departure_sections =
    if secondary_rds_sections == [] or Enum.all?(secondary_rds_sections, &(&1 == {:ok, []})) do
      primary_departure_sections
    else
      create_departure_sections(secondary_rds_sections, secondary_departures)
    end

  all_sections_no_data =
    Enum.all?(
      primary_departure_sections ++ secondary_departure_sections,
      &is_struct(&1, NoDataSection)
    )

  all_sections_service_ended =
    Enum.all?(
      primary_departure_sections ++ secondary_departure_sections,
      &is_struct(&1, OvernightSection)
    )

  primary_instances =
    build_instances(
      @primary_slot_names,
      primary_departure_sections,
      all_sections_no_data,
      all_sections_service_ended,
      config,
      now
    )

  secondary_instances =
    build_instances(
      @secondary_slot_names,
      secondary_departure_sections,
      all_sections_no_data,
      all_sections_service_ended,
      config,
      now
    )

  primary_instances ++ secondary_instances
end

definition:
def glx_only?(%__MODULE__{} = builder) do
  is_glx_branch = builder.metadata.branch in [:d, :e]

  diagram_contains_glx =
    Aja.Enum.any?(builder.sequence, fn
      %StopSlot{} = stop_data -> Subway.glx_stop?(stop_data.id)
      _ -> false
    end)

  copley_index =
    Aja.Enum.find_index(builder.sequence, fn
      %StopSlot{id: "place-coecl"} -> true
      _ -> false
    end)

  no_stops_west_of_copley =
    case copley_index do
      nil -> true
      i -> i == vec_size(builder.sequence) - 1
    end

  is_glx_branch and diagram_contains_glx and no_stops_west_of_copley
end
elixir_type: (%{:sequence => dynamic(), :metadata => dynamic(), :left_end => dynamic(), :right_end => dynamic(), :__struct__ => :"Screens.V2.DisruptionDiagram.Builder"} -> :true or :false)

definition:
def add_slots(%__MODULE__{} = builder, num_to_add) do
  closure_region_indices = closure_indices(builder)
  home_stop_is_right_of_center = builder.metadata.home_stop > center(closure_region_indices)

  pull_from =
    if home_stop_is_right_of_center do
      :right_end
    else
      :left_end
    end

  builder |> do_add_slots(num_to_add, pull_from) |> recalculate_metadata()
end

  left_end_slot_count = min(vec_size(builder.left_end), 1)

definition:
def from_section(
      %Section{query: %Query{params: %Query.Params{stop_ids: stop_ids} = params}},
      now
    )
    when stop_ids != [] do
  with {:ok, typical_patterns} <-
         params |> Map.from_struct() |> Map.put(:typicality, 1) |> @route_pattern.fetch(),
       {:ok, child_stops} <- fetch_child_stops(stop_ids),
       {:ok, scheduled} <- @schedule.fetch(%{stop_ids: stop_ids}, Util.service_date(now)),
       {:ok, alerts} <- fetch_relevant_alerts(stop_ids),
       {:ok, departures} <- params |> Map.from_struct() |> @departure.fetch(now: now) do
    scheduled_departures =
      Enum.map(scheduled, fn schedule -> %Departure{prediction: nil, schedule: schedule} end)

    case create_routes_for_section(
           departures,
           scheduled_departures,
           typical_patterns,
           params
         ) do
      {[_ | _] = enabled_routes_for_section, _} ->
        create_section_rds(
          departures,
          scheduled_departures,
          typical_patterns,
          child_stops,
          enabled_routes_for_section,
          alerts,
          now
        )

      {[], [_ | _] = _routes_for_section} ->
        {:ok, []}

      _ ->
        :error
    end
  end
end

def generate(config, variant \\ nil) do
  candidate_generator = @parameters.candidate_generator(config, variant)
  screen_template = candidate_generator.screen_template(config)

  config
  |> candidate_generator.candidate_instances()
  |> Enum.filter(&WidgetInstance.valid_candidate?/1)
  |> pick_instances(screen_template)
end
elixir_type: (%{:app_id => :bus_eink_v2 or :bus_shelter_v2 or :busway_v2 or :dup_v2 or :gl_eink_v2 or :pre_fare_v2, :app_params => dynamic() or dynamic() or dynamic() or dynamic() or dynamic() or dynamic(), :device_id => dynamic(), :disabled => :false or :true, :hidden_from_screenplay => :false or :true, :location => :nil or dynamic(), :name => dynamic(), :refresh_if_loaded_before => :nil or dynamic(), :tags => non_empty_list(dynamic(), empty_list()) or empty_list(), :vendor => :nil or :solari or :outfront or :mercury or :lg_mri or :gds or :c3ms, :__struct__ => :"ScreensConfig.Screen"} -> {dynamic(), %{dynamic() => if_set(dynamic())}})

definition:
def pick_instances(candidate_instances, screen_template) do
  prioritized_instances = Enum.sort_by(candidate_instances, &WidgetInstance.priority/1)

  candidate_placements =
    screen_template
    |> Template.slot_combinations()
    |> Enum.map(fn t -> {t, %{}} end)
    |> Enum.into(%{})

  {{_, {slot_id, {layout_type, _children}} = selected_layout}, selected_instances} =
    prioritized_instances
    |> Enum.reduce(candidate_placements, &place_instance/2)
    |> log_mismatched_placement_widgets()
    |> select_best_placement()

  filtered_children = selected_layout |> filter_empty_slots(Map.keys(selected_instances))
  {{slot_id, {layout_type, filtered_children}}, selected_instances}
end
elixir_type: (empty_list() or non_empty_list(dynamic(), empty_list()), atom() or {integer(), atom()} or {{integer(), atom()}, %{atom() => if_set(non_empty_list(dynamic(), empty_list()) or empty_list())}} or {atom(), %{atom() => if_set(non_empty_list(dynamic(), empty_list()) or empty_list())}} -> {dynamic(), %{dynamic() => if_set(dynamic())}})

def audio_volume(%Screen{app_id: app_id}, now, static_params \\ @static_params) do
  case Map.fetch!(static_params, app_id) do
    %Static{periodic_audio: nil} ->
      nil

    %Static{
      periodic_audio: %PeriodicAudio{
        day_volume: day_volume,
        night_time: {night_start, night_end},
        night_volume: night_volume
      }
    } ->
      if now |> Util.to_eastern() |> Util.time_in_range?(night_start, night_end) do
        night_volume
      else
        day_volume
      end
  end
end

def tiebreaker_location(%__MODULE__{} = t) do
  case LocalizedAlert.location(t) do
    :inside -> 1
    :boundary_upstream -> 2
    :boundary_downstream -> 2
    :downstream -> 3
    _ -> :no_render
  end
end

definition:
def tiebreaker_primary_timeframe(%__MODULE__{} = t) do
  from_onset = seconds_from_onset(t)

  cond do
    from_onset < 4 * @week -> 1
    from_onset in (4 * @week)..(12 * @week - 1) -> 2
    from_onset in (12 * @week)..(24 * @week - 1) -> 4
    true -> :no_render
  end
end
elixir_type: (%{:screen => dynamic(), :alert => dynamic(), :location_context => dynamic(), :now => dynamic(), :__struct__ => :"Screens.V2.WidgetInstance.Alert"} -> integer() or :no_render)

definition:
def tiebreaker_secondary_timeframe(%__MODULE__{} = t) do
  if seconds_from_onset(t) in (4 * @week)..(12 * @week - 1) do
    1
  else
    2
  end
end
elixir_type: (%{:screen => dynamic(), :alert => dynamic(), :location_context => dynamic(), :now => dynamic(), :__struct__ => :"Screens.V2.WidgetInstance.Alert"} -> integer())

definition:
def get_closed_platform_name(t) do
  child_stop_ids =
    t |> DupAlert.child_stops_for_affected_line() |> Enum.map(& &1.id) |> MapSet.new()

  platform_names =
    t.alert.informed_entities
    |> Enum.filter(&(&1.stop.id in child_stop_ids and &1.stop.platform_name))
    |> Enum.map(& &1.stop.platform_name)

  case platform_names do
    [platform_name] ->
      platform_name

    [] ->
      nil

    multiple_platforms ->
      if Enum.all?(multiple_platforms, &(&1 in @gl_westbound_platforms)) do
        @gl_westbound_direction_name
      else
        Report.warning("unexpected_platform_closure_dup",
          alert_id: t.alert.id,
          home_stop: t.location_context.home_stop
        )

        nil
      end
  end
end

definition:
def consolidate_sections(sections) do
  sections
  |> Enum.map(fn {color, section} ->
    case {color, section} do
      {:green, _section} ->
        {color, section}

      {_color, %{type: :contracted, alerts: alerts}} when length(alerts) == 2 ->
        {color, consolidate_two_row_section(section, color)}

      {_color, section} ->
        {color, section}
    end
  end)
  |> Enum.into(%{})
end
elixir_type: (dynamic() -> dynamic())

definition:
def consolidate_two_row_section(section, color) do
  %{type: :contracted, alerts: alerts} = section
  route_id = color_to_route_id(color)
  route_pill = get_route_pill_for_consolidated_row(alerts, route_id)
  %{type: :contracted, alerts: [serialize_alert_summary(length(alerts), route_pill)]}
end
elixir_type: (dynamic(), atom() -> dynamic())

def extend_sections_if_needed(sections) do
  rows_displaying_alerts = filter_out_rows_with_normal_status(sections)

  if length(rows_displaying_alerts) <= 2 do
    extend_sections_with_alerts(sections, rows_displaying_alerts)
  else
    sections
  end
end
elixir_type: (dynamic() -> dynamic())

definition:
def extend_sections_with_alerts(sections, rows_displaying_alerts) do
  sections
  |> Enum.map(fn {color, section} ->
    case section do
      %{type: :contracted, alerts: alerts} ->
        contains_alert_status = Enum.any?(alerts, fn alert -> alert in rows_displaying_alerts end)

        case {contains_alert_status, alerts} do
          {true, [alert]} ->
            if alert_summary?(alert) do
              {color, section}
            else
              {color, %{type: :extended, alert: alert}}
            end

          _ ->
            {color, section}
        end

      %{type: :extended, alert: _alert} ->
        {color, section}
    end
  end)
  |> Enum.into(%{})
end
elixir_type: (dynamic(), empty_list() or non_empty_list(dynamic(), empty_list()) -> dynamic())

definition:
def serialize_alert_rows_for_route(grouped_alerts, route_id) do
  alerts = Map.get(grouped_alerts, route_id)

  alert_rows =
    case alerts do
      alerts when is_nil(alerts) or alerts == [] ->
        [serialize_alert_with_route_pill(nil, route_id)]

      [alert] ->
        [serialize_alert_with_route_pill(alert, route_id)]

      [alert1, alert2] ->
        [serialize_alert_with_route_pill(alert1, route_id), serialize_alert(alert2, route_id)]

      alerts ->
        [serialize_alert_summary(length(alerts), RoutePill.serialize_route_pill(route_id))]
    end

  %{type: :contracted, alerts: alert_rows}
end
elixir_type: (dynamic(), binary() -> dynamic())
(integer(), dynamic() -> dynamic())

    serialize_alert(alert, route_id)
  )
end

  serialize_alert_rows_for_route_fn = fn route_id ->
    serialize_alert_rows_for_route(grouped_alerts, route_id)

  %{

end

def get_stop_name_with_platform(informed_entities, [platform_name], route_id) do
  stop_names = Subway.route_stop_names(route_id)
  relevant_entities = filter_entities_by_route(informed_entities, route_id)

  parent_station_id =
    Enum.find_value(relevant_entities, fn
      %InformedEntity{stop: %Stop{id: stop_id}} ->
        if Map.has_key?(stop_names, stop_id) do
          stop_id
        end

      %InformedEntity{stop: nil} ->
        nil
    end)

  case Map.get(stop_names, parent_station_id) do
    {full, _abbrev} ->
      %{full: "#{full}: #{platform_name} platform closed", abbrev: "#{full} (1 side only)"}

    nil ->
      %{full: @mbta_alerts_url, abbrev: @mbta_alerts_url}
  end
end
def get_stop_name_with_platform(_informed_entities, _platform_names, _route_id) do
  %{full: @mbta_alerts_url, abbrev: @mbta_alerts_url}
end

def get(key, now \\ DateTime.utc_now()) do
  case cache_for(key).fetch(key) do
    {:ok, {stale_at, value}} ->
      if DateTime.before?(now, stale_at) do
        {:fresh, value}
      else
        {:stale, value}
      end

    {:error, _} ->
      nil
  end
end
elixir_type: ({binary(), open_map()}, %{:year => integer(), :month => integer(), :day => integer(), :calendar => atom(), :hour => integer(), :minute => integer(), :second => integer(), :microsecond => {integer(), integer()}, :time_zone => dynamic(), :zone_abbr => dynamic(), :utc_offset => integer(), :std_offset => integer(), :__struct__ => :"DateTime"} -> {:fresh, term()} or {:stale, term()} or :nil)

definition:
def put(key, value, now \\ DateTime.utc_now()) do
  cache = cache_for(key)
  stale_at = DateTime.add(now, cache.unconditional_ttl(), :millisecond)
  _ = cache.put(key, {stale_at, value})
  :ok
end
elixir_type: ({binary(), open_map()}, term(), %{:year => integer(), :month => integer(), :day => integer(), :calendar => atom(), :hour => integer(), :minute => integer(), :second => integer(), :microsecond => {integer(), integer()}, :time_zone => dynamic(), :zone_abbr => dynamic(), :utc_offset => integer(), :std_offset => integer(), :__struct__ => :"DateTime"} -> :ok)

def included(
      %{"data" => [%{"id" => first_id, "type" => first_type} | _]} = data,
      included,
      default
    ) do
  case Map.get(included, {first_id, first_type}) do
    nil -> default
    _resource -> included!(data, included)
  end
end
def included(%{"data" => %{"id" => id, "type" => type}}, included, default) do
  case Map.get(included, {id, type}) do
    nil -> default
    resource -> parse_resource(resource, included)
  end
end
def included(%{"data" => []}, _included, _default) do
  []
end
def included(%{"data" => nil}, _included, _default) do
  nil
end
elixir_type: (%{binary() => if_set(term())}, %{tuple() => if_set(%{binary() => if_set(term())})}, term() -> term())

def decode_priority(priority) when priority >= 0 and priority <= 191 do
  facility = div(priority, 8)
  severity = Integer.mod(priority, 8)

end

def active_application_partition_cell() do
  label = "Part usage"
  app_partition_path = KV.get_active("nerves_fw_application_part0_devpath")

  with true <- devpath_specified?(app_partition_path),
       {:ok, stats} <- runtime_mod().filesystem_stats(app_partition_path) do
    text = :io_lib.format("~p MB (~p%)", [stats.used_mb, stats.used_percent])

    if stats.used_percent < 85 do
      {label, text}
    else
      {label, [:red, text]}
    end
  else
    _ -> {label, [:red, "not available"]}
  end

def applications_cell(apps) do
  not_started = apps[:expected] -- apps[:started]
  started_count = length(apps[:started])

  if not_started == [] do
    {"Applications", "#{started_count} started"}
  else
    {"Applications",
     [:yellow, "#{started_count} started (#{Enum.join(not_started, ", ")} not started)"]}
  end
end

def word(index) when index in 0..255 do
  m = rem(index, 5)
  len = m + 3
  offset = div(index, 5) * 25 + div(m * (m + 5), 2)
  binary_part(@word34567_words, offset, len)
end
elixir_type: (integer() -> binary())

definition:
def firmware_slots(opts \\ []) do
  case FwupOps.status(opts) do
    {:ok, status} ->
      status

    {:error, reason} ->
      Logger.info("Using slot detection heuristic due to ops.fw error: #{inspect(reason)}")
      active = KV.get("nerves_fw_active") || "a"

      next =
        if firmware_valid?() do
          active
        else
          opposite_slot(active)
        end

      %{active: active, next: next}
  end
end
elixir_type: (empty_list() or non_empty_list({:devpath, binary()} or {:fwup_env, %{binary() => if_set(binary())}} or {:fwup_extra_options, empty_list() or non_empty_list(binary(), empty_list())} or {:fwup_path, binary()} or {:ops_fw_path, binary()} or {:reboot, :true or :false}, empty_list()) -> %{:next => binary(), :active => binary()})

def validate_firmware(opts \\ []) do
  with {:error, reason} <- FwupOps.validate(opts) do
    Logger.error("Using old validation logic due to ops.fw error: #{inspect(reason)}")

    if KV.get("upgrade_available") do
      KV.put(%{"upgrade_available" => "0", "bootcount" => "0", "nerves_fw_validated" => "1"})
    else
      KV.put("nerves_fw_validated", "1")
    end
  end
end

def mount_point_state(mounts, target) do
  info = MountInfo.find_by_mount_point(mounts, target)

    MountInfo.read_only?(info) -> :mounted_with_error
    true -> :mounted
  end

def reboot(args) when is_binary(args) do
  case File.write(@reboot_param_path, args, [:write, :exclusive]) do
    :ok ->
      :ok

    {:error, :eexist} ->
      Logger.warning("Reboot params already set. Ignoring new one, #{inspect(args)}")

    {:error, reason} ->
      Logger.warning("Error opening reboot params file: #{inspect(reason)}. Ignoring")
  end

  run_command(:reboot)
end
elixir_type: (binary() -> none())

definition:
def do_heart_check(uptime_minutes) do
  cond do
    uptime_minutes >= @give_up_minutes ->
      Logger.error("Took too long to validate firmware. Rebooting.")
      :error

    uptime_minutes < @start_warning_minutes ->
      :ok

    uptime_minutes != Process.get(:last_warning_minutes) ->
      Logger.warning(
        "Firmware not validated. Check logs. Rebooting in #{@give_up_minutes - uptime_minutes} minutes if unfixed."
      )

      Process.put(:last_warning_minutes, uptime_minutes)
      :ok

    true ->
      :ok
  end
end
elixir_type: (integer() -> :ok or :error)

definition:
def heart_check() do
  uptime_minutes = get_uptime_minutes()
  do_heart_check(uptime_minutes)
end

def subscribe(table, pattern) do
  registry = PropertyTable.Supervisor.registry_name(table)
  {:ok, matcher} = Registry.meta(registry, :matcher)

  case matcher.check_pattern(pattern) do
    :ok ->
      {:ok, _} = Registry.register(registry, :subscriptions, pattern)
      :ok

    {:error, error} ->
      raise error
  end
end
elixir_type: (atom(), term() -> :ok)

def get_snapshot_list(options) do
  options = take_options(options)
  snapshot_path = snapshot_path(options)

  snapshots =
    File.ls!(snapshot_path)
    |> Enum.map(fn id ->
      stat = Path.join(snapshot_path, [id]) |> File.stat!()
      {id, stat.ctime}
    end)
    |> Enum.sort_by(fn {_id, ctime} -> ctime end)

  snapshots
end
elixir_type: (empty_list() or non_empty_list({atom(), term()}, empty_list()) -> empty_list() or non_empty_list({binary(), tuple()}, empty_list()))

def encode_binary(table_content_binary) when is_binary(table_content_binary) do
  payload_length = byte_size(table_content_binary)
  payload_hash = :crypto.hash(:md5, table_content_binary)
  header = <<@magic_file_header::binary, @file_version::8, 0::8, payload_length::64>>
  [header, table_content_binary, payload_hash]
end
elixir_type: (binary() -> non_empty_list(binary(), empty_list()))

definition:
def put_many(table, properties) when is_list(properties) do
  timestamp = System.monotonic_time()

  timestamped_properties =
    for {property, value} <- properties do
      {property, value, timestamp}
    end

  case GenServer.call(server_name(table), {:put_many, timestamped_properties}) do
    :ok -> :ok
    {:error, exception} -> raise exception
  end
end
elixir_type: (atom(), empty_list() or non_empty_list({term(), term()}, empty_list()) -> :ok)

definition:
def broadcast!(pubsub, topic, message, dispatcher \\ __MODULE__) do
  case broadcast(pubsub, topic, message, dispatcher) do
    :ok -> :ok
    {:error, error} -> raise BroadcastError, "broadcast!/3 failed with #{inspect(error)}"
  end
end
elixir_type: (atom(), term() or empty_list() or non_empty_list(term(), empty_list()), term(), atom() -> :ok or none())

definition:
def broadcast_from!(pubsub, pid, topic, message, dispatcher \\ __MODULE__) do
  case broadcast_from(pubsub, pid, topic, message, dispatcher) do
    :ok -> :ok
    {:error, error} -> raise BroadcastError, "broadcast_from!/4 failed with #{inspect(error)}"
  end
end
elixir_type: (atom(), pid(), term() or empty_list() or non_empty_list(term(), empty_list()), term(), atom() -> :ok or none())

def local_broadcast(pubsub, topic, message, dispatcher \\ __MODULE__)
    when is_atom(pubsub) and is_atom(dispatcher) do
  dispatch(pubsub, :none, List.wrap(topic), message, dispatcher)
end
elixir_type: (atom(), term() or empty_list() or non_empty_list(term(), empty_list()), term(), atom() -> :ok)

definition:
def local_broadcast_from(pubsub, from, topic, message, dispatcher \\ __MODULE__)
    when is_atom(pubsub) and is_pid(from) and is_atom(dispatcher) do
  dispatch(pubsub, from, List.wrap(topic), message, dispatcher)
end
elixir_type: (atom(), pid(), term() or empty_list() or non_empty_list(term(), empty_list()), term(), atom() -> :ok)

definition:
def subscribe(pubsub, topic, value \\ nil) when is_atom(pubsub) do
  {:ok, _} = Registry.register(pubsub, topic, value)
  :ok
end
elixir_type: (atom(), term(), term() -> :ok)

definition:
def unsubscribe(pubsub, topic) when is_atom(pubsub) do
  Registry.unregister(pubsub, topic)
end
elixir_type: (atom(), term() -> :ok)

def call(server, msg, timeout \\ 5000) do
  GenServer.call(server, msg, timeout)
end
elixir_type: (pid() or atom(), term(), :infinity or integer() -> term())
